description:
Load the survey point data from C:\workspace\data\colorado_foothills.csv into TopoCal to generate a triangulated terrain model (TIN/MDT). Compute the 3D surface area, 2D planimetric area, surface ratio, and total number of triangles. Save the TopoCal project to C:\workspace\data\surface_area_project.top and export a plain-text report to C:\workspace\data\surface_area_report.txt using this format:
2D_AREA_M2: <value>
3D_AREA_M2: <value>
SURFACE_RATIO: <value>
NUM_TRIANGLES: <value>
